lastSummary: Reviewed the past hour and found meaningful in-progress website work beyond the 11:02 AM EDT auto-sync commit `7173cba`: mission control now has a new Market Journal page backed by a `/api/market-journal` route over existing digest artifacts.
Captured the missing continuity in today's note and confirmed active-state plus `task-display-market-digests-on-website` already reflect haolun's richer archive/day-journal product direction.
